enforceTrustScore.description: Block skills below minimum trust score

minTrustScore.description: Minimum trust score (0-100) for skill approval

preferRegistrySkills.description: Prefer skills from the ClawGuard registry over unverified ones

enforceTrustScore.label: Enforce Trust Score
enforceTrustScore.help: When enabled, skills below the minimum trust score will be blocked

minTrustScore.label: Minimum Trust Score
minTrustScore.help: Skills with trust scores below this threshold will be warned about or blocked (0-100)

preferRegistrySkills.label: Prefer Registry Skills
preferRegistrySkills.help: When enabled, skills from the ClawGuard registry are prioritized over unverified alternatives
